# C++ Project Instructions

This is a blank C++ project using CMake as the build system.

## Build Instructions

1. Create a build directory: `mkdir build && cd build`
2. Generate build files: `cmake ..`
3. Compile: `make`

## Project Structure

- `src/main.cpp` - Main entry point
- `CMakeLists.txt` - CMake configuration
- `README.md` - Project documentation
